programmes.show_description: Signed, Sealed, Delivered! Discover everyday cardmaking essentials, including Trim Me! Stickables, Envelope Making Papers, Premier Craft Tools Envelope Making, and more.
Lauren is here with a launch from the UK's leading supplier of arts & crafts books. These practical books delight and instruct artists and crafters of all skill levels worldwide.
With the largest range of craft brands around, HobbyMaker is excited to introduce the newest member of our creative family!
Start your charm collection with this elegant bracelet! Designed to showcase your passion for crafting, it's the perfect base for our beautiful crafting-themed clip-on charms.
Hip hip hooray, it's our 4th Birthday! Celebrate with 60 minutes of exclusive offers, packed with must-have goodies and special treats you won't want to miss.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
Debbie Shore shows us three brand new fabric collections, all featuring a beautiful panel.
...Pattern: Wendy Ross-Constance joins us to demonstrate the Olive Dress & Top Pattern by Megan Nielsen.
Welcoming Pete Hughes to Sewing Street - he will be using Sizzix tools to create beautiful buttons!
...Stevie Patterns: Wendy Ross-Constance demonstrates two Tilly and the Buttons patterns - Nell & Stevie.
...Winter Shawl: Sam Sabido will be bringing us the brand new Daisy Bloom Jacket, in beautiful colourways - perfect for Spring! And bringing back the Shades of winter Shawl.
The new and exclusive Print & Pattern Tool, created with Catherine Pooler, makes pattern play simple and fun! This dual tool makes creating repeat patterns easier than ever.
It's time for a brand-new designer launch! Tune in for fabulous demos and amazing deals. Get ready for a crafty hour packed with new stamps, dies, stencils, washi tape, and more.
Sandra joins us for birthday celebrations with more inspiration and mesmerising designs from the world of Sanntangle featuring the NEW Cute and cuddly stencil and The Farmyard.

Celebrate the colour, creativity, and quality of Moda fabrics with stunning collections perfect for quilting, patchwork, and inspiring handmade projects.
Delphine Brooks is going to be demonstrating the brand new Sanderson Cozy Gathering Quilt Kit.
Discover durable fabrics and essential accessories designed for creating stylish, long-lasting bags.
The incredibly talented designer Delphine Brooks shows us some of her most beautiful work.
Discover great deals on beautifully printed fabric panels, perfect for creating quilts, cushions, wall hangings, and quick sewing projects with stunning designs already built in.
Wendy's on the birthday guest list, bringing the Country Garden Collection, a beautiful range of A6 and A7 clear stamp sets, stencil sets, and more to inspire your crafting.
Goody Boxes are back and you can order yours today. Jam-packed with an exciting mix of Hunkydory goodies in a super stylish box. Full of craft essentials - discover what's inside!
Join us in welcoming PD Quilling to the HobbyMaker family. Founded by Kate in West Yorkshire, this independent UK-based brand is dedicated to all things quilling.
Designed and manufactured by crafters for crafters. Jo Venison is back for HobbyMaker's 4th birthday with a brand new unit to organise your crafting space.
